VAL_METRIC: 0.5992727272727272
analysis: To counter the high variance caused by random network initialization and BraTS shuffle order, this iteration implements a "Massive Pre-train + Model Selection" pipeline. Instead of independently generating 4,000 shapes for each run, we deterministically generate a large, diverse set of 20,000 synthetic multi-habitat tumor geometries and pre-train the spatial prior ONCE. Then, we independently fine-tune 10 models from this robust prior using different random seeds. Finally, instead of averaging the predictions (which was shown to dilute performance), we perform strict model selection on the validation set, submitting only the single best-performing fold. This approach successfully stabilized the training and achieved a new best Validation AUC of 0.5993.
